header_text.en: SIM4X/SIM8X trips will be discontinued, more trips coming to SIM4/SIM8
header_text.en_html: SIM4X/SIM8X trips will be discontinued, more trips coming to SIM4/SIM8

description_text.en:
Things to know:
SIM4X and SIM8X are special express trips of the SIM4 and SIM8 routes.
Regular SIM4 and SIM8 trips will not be reduced.
Some of the express SIM4X and SIM8X trips will be converted to full route SIM4 and SIM8 trips.
These changes are part of our regular process of reviewing bus schedules and ridership demand. Discontinuing the SIM4X and SIM8X and converting some of these trips into full-route SIM4 and SIM8 trips will better use underutilized resources.
description_text.en_html:

  • Regular SIM4 and SIM8 trips will not be reduced.

These changes are part of our regular process of reviewing bus schedules and ridership demand. Discontinuing the SIM4X and SIM8X and converting some of these trips into full-route SIM4 and SIM8 trips will better use underutilized resources.

header_text.en: Service adjustments for the change to Daylight Saving Time
header_text.en_html: Service adjustments for the change to Daylight Saving Time

description_text.en:
Trains already enroute when the time changes will continue their trips.
All trains that normally begin their trips in the omitted 2am hour will do so in the 3am hour.
Trains that normally begin their trips in the 3am hour will do so as normal.
If you are traveling during the time change, be sure to double check your scheduled departure time on the the TrainTime app.
During the changeover, the app will not show real time information and you may experience technical difficulties with station platform signs.

header_text.en: Buses replace trains between Babylon and Montauk
header_text.en_html: Buses replace trains between Babylon and Montauk

description_text.en:
Check bus departure times on TrainTime or at mta.info/schedules, as westbound buses leave earlier than normal train times.

Buses will generally run in three zones, making all stops along a section of the branch and running non-stop to/from Babylon. Local travel between stops in different zones is not possible.
Bay Shore through Patchogue
Bellport through Southampton
Bridgehampton through Montauk
The last trains to run are the 8:36pm from Babylon and the 9:07pm from Speonk. Service resumes with the 4:10am from Speonk.

What's happening?
Track maintenance

description_text.en:
Trains stop at Hunts Point Av.

For service to St Lawrence Av, Morrison Av-Soundview, Elder Av and Whitlock Av, take the [6] to Hunts Point Av and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].

For service to Longwood Av, E 149 St, E 143 St-St Mary's St, Cypress Av and Brook Av, take the [6] to 3 Av-138 St and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].

For service from these stations, take the [6] to Hunts Point Av or Parkchester and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [6].

Notes: [6] runs every 16 minutes (days/evenings) in the Bronx and the last stop for alternate Bronx-bound trains is 3 Av-138 St. Transfer at 3 Av-138 St to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6] to continue your trip.

header_text.en: In the Bronx, Manhattan-bound [6] runs express from Parkchester to 3 Av-138 St
header_text.en_html: In the Bronx, Manhattan-bound [6] runs express from Parkchester to 3 Av-138 St

description_text.en:
Trains stop at Hunts Point Av.

For service to St Lawrence Av, Morrison Av-Soundview, Elder Av and Whitlock Av, take the [6] to Hunts Point Av and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].

For service to Longwood Av, E 149 St, E 143 St-St Mary's St, Cypress Av and Brook Av, take the [6] to 3 Av-138 St and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].

For service from these stations, take the [6] to Hunts Point Av or Parkchester and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [6].

Notes: [6] runs every 12 minutes (days/evenings) in the Bronx and the last stop for alternate Bronx-bound trains is 3 Av-138 St. Transfer at 3 Av-138 St to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6] to continue your trip.

[accessibility icon] If you're on a train terminating at 3 Av-138 St, an accessible transfer is available at 125 St [accessibility icon] to the next Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].

What's happening?
We're replacing tracks

header_text.en: Buses replace trains between Babylon and Montauk
header_text.en_html: Buses replace trains between Babylon and Montauk

description_text.en:
Check bus departure times on TrainTime or at mta.info/schedules, as westbound buses leave earlier than normal train times.

Buses will run in three zones, making all stops along a section of the branch and running non-stop to/from Babylon. Local travel between stops in different zones is not possible.
Bay Shore through Patchogue
Bellport through Southampton
Bridgehampton through Montauk
The last trains to run are the 8:36pm from Babylon and the 9:07pm from Speonk. Service resumes with the 4:10am from Speonk.

What's happening?
Track maintenance

description_text.en:
Check bus departure times on TrainTime or at mta.info/schedules. In most cases, buses will connect in Babylon with regular Babylon Branch trains, and express diesel trains to/from Jamaica will not run.

Buses will generally run in three zones, making all stops along a section of the branch and running non-stop to/from Babylon. Local travel between stops in different zones is not possible.
Bay Shore through Patchogue
Bellport through Southampton
Bridgehampton through Montauk
The last trains to run on Friday night are the 8:36pm from Babylon and the 9:59pm from Speonk. Service resumes with the 4:10am from Speonk on Monday morning.

What's happening?
Track maintenance

description_text.en:
For Hollis, Queens Village, and Elmont-UBS Arena, westbound service will be available on Huntington trains. MTA buses will accept LIRR tickets for eastbound travel from Jamaica to these stations.
For Floral Park, service will still be available on Huntington trains.
For Stewart Manor, Nassau Boulevard, Garden City, and Hempstead, bus service is available to and from Mineola.
For Bellerose and Country Life Press, NICE Bus will accept LIRR tickets on nearby routes.
What's happening?
Signal upgrades
